description: A vehicle's telematics system automatically detects a collision and alerts the support center.

nodes.task_description: Receive the automated alert, which includes the vehicle's location and an indication of a severe impact.

expected_outcome.value: Agent receives the alert with GPS coordinates and 'Airbag Deployment' flag.

nodes.task_description: Immediately open a voice channel to the vehicle to speak with the occupants.

expected_outcome.value: Agent successfully establishes a two-way voice call into the car's cabin.

nodes.task_description: If there is no response or if help is requested, dispatch emergency services (police, ambulance) to the vehicle's location.

expected_outcome.value: Agent receives no response and dispatches emergency services with the location.
